title: LM Studio server
description: Connect to a local LM Studio native v1 server.

fields.label: Endpoint URL
fields.description: Base URL of LM Studio's server. The plugin appends /api/v1/chat and /api/v1/models; a trailing slash is normalized. Non-default hosts must also be added to permissions.network.allow.

fields.label: Model fallback
fields.placeholder: leave blank to use the loaded model
fields.description: Fallback model id. A preset model or spawn-time model overrides this.

title: Presets
description: Open-shell presets select the system prompt, model, and native LM Studio parameters for new sessions.

fields.label: Default preset
fields.description: Preset id to use when a session does not specify ctx.preset.

fields.title: Preset objects
fields.body: Edit config.yaml for the presets array. Shape: presets: [{ id, name, systemPrompt, model?, params? }]. The default config seeds the codeterm preset from prompts/codeterm-default.md.
